title: BILLYIZATION
description:
For W1D3A55's YTPMV collab: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6wrwonsBFM

Let me just say, this song (Justice - Civilization) is pretty difficult to YTPMV, and is way way beyond my personal skill level.  But regardless, it's one of my favorite songs of 2011, and this is the first YTPMV of it anyone has ever attempted.

All rights to the background video belong to Justice. obviously.  I simply stuck Billy Mays' face in there a few times.
